author: doll-agent
content: Added matvec() and vecmat() to ferray-linalg::products (NumPy 2.0 names for matrix*vector and vector*matrix products), and re-exported matmul, vecdot, matvec, vecmat at the top of the umbrella ferray crate (gated on the linalg feature) — matching numpy.matmul / numpy.vecdot / numpy.matvec / numpy.vecmat top-level placement. matvec(M, v) requires M 2-D and v 1-D; vecmat(v, M) the reverse. 4 unit tests cover both basic and shape-mismatch error paths. cargo test passes (185 ferray-linalg, 357 ferray-ufunc); cargo clippy --features linalg --features stride-tricks clean.
